backend-diyiya.description: Especialista backend Django/DRF/Channels. Modelos, viewsets, serializers, WebSocket consumers, Celery tasks.

frontend-diyiya.description: Especialista frontend React/TypeScript/Tailwind. Páginas POS, cocina, dashboard, shadcn/ui componentes, PWA, offline.

ui-ux-diyiya.description: Especialista UI/UX. Framer Motion animaciones, diseño responsive tablet/TV/móvil, modo sol, micro-interacciones, paleta caribeña.

devops-diyiya.description: Especialista DevOps. Docker, VPS, Nginx, backups S3, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, Redis.
